---
title: "Arthur Declercq"
description: "PhD researcher, peptide property prediction and ion mobility"
image: ../assets/images/arthur.jpg
order: 3
orcid: "https://orcid.org/0000-0002-9376-1399"
---

## About

Research focus: deep learning for ion mobility and CCS prediction, and rescoring of peptide-spectrum matches.

## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/compomics)
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-9376-1399)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/)
